final:
module Adder32Bit (
    input [31:0] A,
    input [31:0] B,
    input Cin,
    output [31:0] S,
    output Cout
);
    assign {Cout, S} = A + B + Cin; // Perform addition and include carry-in
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      S[0] <= ~A[0];
      Cout <= A[0] & B[0];
    end
  end

endmodule
